<!DOCTYPE qgis PUBLIC 'http://mrcc.com/qgis.dtd' 'SYSTEM'>
<qgis version="3.42.1-Münster">
  <identifier>https://geo.rijkswaterstaat.nl/arcgis/rest/services/GDR/kustlijn_landen_noordzee/MapServer/0</identifier>
  <parentidentifier></parentidentifier>
  <language></language>
  <type>dataset</type>
  <title>nederland</title>
  <abstract></abstract>
  <links>
    <link type="WWW:LINK" mimeType="" url="https://geo.rijkswaterstaat.nl/arcgis/rest/services/GDR/kustlijn_landen_noordzee/MapServer/0" name="Source" size="" description="" format=""/>
  </links>
  <dates/>
  <fees></fees>
  <encoding></encoding>
  <crs>
    <spatialrefsys nativeFormat="Wkt">
      <wkt></wkt>
      <proj4>+proj=utm +zone=31 +ellps=GRS80 +towgs84=0,0,0,0,0,0,0 +units=m +no_defs</proj4>
      <srsid>2104</srsid>
      <srid>25831</srid>
      <authid>EPSG:25831</authid>
      <description>ETRS89 / UTM zone 31N</description>
      <projectionacronym>utm</projectionacronym>
      <ellipsoidacronym>EPSG:7019</ellipsoidacronym>
      <geographicflag>false</geographicflag>
    </spatialrefsys>
  </crs>
  <extent>
    <spatial miny="5237324.76170000061392784" maxx="1149258.1368000004440546" crs="EPSG:25831" maxy="7147231.93239999935030937" maxz="nan" dimensions="2" minz="nan" minx="-420648.88420000020414591"/>
  </extent>
</qgis>
